name: The antechamber
description:
You are in the Antechamber of the Shogun.  This room is full of paintings of
warriors, written declarations of respect for fellow Samurai, and what seems to
be a grocery list.

exits.description: A landing is to your east.
The Shogun's chamber is south of you.

extra_descriptions.description:
The list reads:
		Eggs
		Flour
		Condoms
